title: mariscus cephalanthus
intro: Mariscus cephalanthus, also known as the marsh club moss or Cephalanthus mariscus, is a plant species native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as having antimicrobial properties. Mariscus cephalanthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
